lines.english: You are the Great Giver; I am Your slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਜੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਗਿਆਨ ਰਤਨੁ ਦੀਪਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: amrit naam kripaa kar deejai gur giaan ratan deepaaeaa |6|
lines.english: Please be merciful and bless me with Your Ambrosial Naam, and the jewel, the lamp of the Guru's spiritual wisdom. ||6||
Finding the Lord, the Supreme Soul, peace is established.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: panch tat mil ihu tan keea |
lines.english: From the union of the five elements, this body was made.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਕਰਤੂਤਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਮਨਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: karam karatoot amrit fal laagaa har naam ratan man paaeaa |7|
lines.english: The good karma of past actions brings fruitful rewards, and man is blessed with the jewel of the Lord's Name. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭੂਖ ਪਿਆਸ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis bhookh piaas man maaniaa |
lines.english: His mind does not feel any hunger or thirst.
He knows the Immaculate Lord to be everywhere, in each and every heart.
Whoever does the deeds of the soul, day and night,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਕੇਵਲ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: amrit ras raataa keval bairaagee guramat bhaae subhaaeaa |8|
lines.english: Imbued with the Lord's Ambrosial essence, he becomes a pure, detached renunciate; he is lovingly absorbed in the Guru's Teachings. ||8||
sees the immaculate Divine Light deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਰਸਾਲੁ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਬੇਣੁ ਰਸਾਲੁ ਵਜਾਇਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: sabad rasaal rasan ras rasanaa ben rasaal vajaaeaa |9|
lines.english: Enraptured with the delightful essence of the Shabad, the source of nectar, my tongue plays the sweet music of the flute. ||9||
He alone plays the sweet music of this flute,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬੂਝਹੁ ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak boojhahu ih bidh guramat har raam naam liv laaeaa |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, know this, through the Guru's Teachings, and lovingly focus yourself on the Lord's Name. ||10||
who knows the three worlds.
who contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad, and remain detached.
Rare are those beings in this world,
He alone knows the home of his own heart, and the door to the temple,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰਹਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਸਫਲ ਜਨਮੁ ਜਗਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aap tareh sangat kul taareh tin safal janam jag aaeaa |11|
lines.english: They save themselves, and save all their associates and ancestors; fruitful is their birth and coming into this world. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਗੜ ਮਹਲ ਮਹਲੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਤਖਤੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa garr mehal mahalee prabh saachaa sach saachaa takhat rachaaeaa |12|
lines.english: In the body-fortress is the palace; God is the True Master of this Palace. The True Lord established His True Throne there. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis poore gur te sojhee hoee |
lines.english: who obtains perfect understanding from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਤੁਰ ਦਸ ਹਾਟ ਦੀਵੇ ਦੁਇ ਸਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: chatur das haatt deeve due saakhee |
lines.english: The fourteen realms and the two lamps are the witnesses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਅਨੂਪ ਨਿਰਮੋਲਕ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: antar vasat anoop niramolak gur miliai har dhan paaeaa |13|
lines.english: Deep within, is the priceless, incomparable commodity; meeting with the Guru, the wealth of the Lord is obtained. ||13||
The Lord's servants, the self-elect, do not taste the poison of corruption.
Following the Guru's Teachings, he subdues the five demons, and becomes the Lord's foot soldier.
He alone sits on the throne, who is worthy of the throne.
The Lord of the Throne is greeted and worshipped day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦੀ ਹੈ ਭੀ ਹੋਸੀ ਸਹਸਾ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aad jugaadee hai bhee hosee sahasaa bharam chukaaeaa |14|
lines.english: He has existed from the very beginning of time and throughout the ages; He exists here and now, and will always exist. Meditating on Him, skepticism and doubt are dispelled. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਜਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: eihu saach vaddaaee guramat liv jaatee |
lines.english: This true glorious greatness comes to those who love the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਤਰੁ ਤਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਖਾਈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੫॥੧॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak raam japahu tar taaree har ant sakhaaee paaeaa |15|1|18|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate on the Lord, and swim across the river; they find the Lord, their best friend, in the end. ||15||1||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਸਕਰੁ ਚੋਰੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਗਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tasakar chor na laagai taa kau dhun upajai sabad jagaaeaa |1|
lines.english: This wealth cannot be stolen; the celestial melody of the Shabad wells up and keeps us awake and aware. ||1||
Maaroo, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਸੰਚਹੁ ਰੇ ਜਨ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan sanchahu re jan bhaaee |
lines.english: Gather in the wealth of the Lord, O humble Siblings of Destiny.
Serve the True Guru, and remain in His Sanctuary.
You are the One Universal Creator, the Immaculate King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰਹਿ ਜਨ ਕੇ ਕਾਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: too aap savaareh jan ke kaajaa |
lines.english: You Yourself arrange and resolve the affairs of Your humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰੁ ਅਡੋਲੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਅਮੋਲਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਅਸਥਿਰ ਥਾਨਿ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: amar addol apaar amolak har asathir thaan suhaaeaa |2|
lines.english: You are immortal, immovable, infinite and priceless; O Lord, Your place is beautiful and eternal. ||2||
In the body-village, the most sublime place,
the supremely noble people dwell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਪਰਿ ਏਕੰਕਾਰੁ ਨਿਰਾਲਮੁ ਸੁੰਨ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aoopar ekankaar niraalam sun samaadh lagaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Above them is the Immaculate Lord, the One Universal Creator; they are lovingly absorbed in the profound, primal state of Samaadhi. ||3||
There are nine gates to the body-village;
the Creator Lord fashioned them for each and every person.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸਵੈ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਤੀਤੁ ਨਿਰਾਲਾ ਆਪੇ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: dasavai purakh ateet niraalaa aape alakh lakhaaeaa |4|
lines.english: Within the Tenth Gate, dwells the Primal Lord, detached and unequalled. The unknowable reveals Himself. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਖੋਜਿ ਲਹਹੁ ਘਰੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak khoj lahahu ghar apanaa har aatam raam naam paaeaa |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, search and examine your own home, and you shall find the Supreme Soul, and the Name of the Lord. ||5||
The Primal Lord cannot be held to account; True is His Celestial Court.
The Hukam of His Command is in effect; True is His Insignia.
